参加向往的生活，陆飞全能巨星身份被曝光，还意外发现兄弟们的真正身份：大哥是慧康公司女总裁、二哥是豪门大小姐、老师秦夕瑶、三哥是歌坛小天后郑诗颖、五弟是隐世女神医、六弟是小花旦洛晴川、七弟是神秘风水师、八弟是无敌女战神、九弟是智商168的天才少女。
当兄弟们的身份陆续暴露，想到之前在群里说的话，“兄弟”九人开启了互坑模式，死道友不死贫道……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od657e4830d326b1ac869d934f9607692~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"西门煮雪","author_id":"","book_id":"6971969619904957448","book_name":"娱乐：我全能巨星，被向往曝光了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6971976194514223623","read_count":"469","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"549402"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"251","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,娱乐圈","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od657e4830d326b1ac869d934f9607692~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434057&x-signature=umemkBCLCWIgYH4okNDxeyrdx2g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"18914735935","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8972,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17294,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":73429},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1623918792,"author_reply_time":1623918788,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6984340352702677800","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书我真的是爱了啊，这种涉及娱乐圈的文我看过很多，要么索然无味，要么就烂尾，但这本我可以说是我看到的十分满意的一本，适当的打脸，适当的逆袭，再加上部分搞笑捉弄的片段让这篇文充满乐趣，不至于看着看着就腻了，希望作者加油，快点更新，不要写着写着就烂尾了，否则卖刀片的日子不远了（doge）小声bb：陆狗子那种兄弟情深的感情我很喜欢，加油！！！٩(๑^o^๑)۶"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1626168463,"group_id":"6971969619904957448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个希望成为崇皇的人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyro00kajsDhYfSEk/H3f0Cgo7vOPomlZX7zgLvEMsxT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/c5ee1bcabc8344379f1d131080c94e21~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796319&x-signature=aJp1OulVTVRFdOir16QlFy8zzTo%3D","user_id":"1670899996563405","user_name":"真不知道叫啥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1670899996563405","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6971969619904957448","book_info":{"abstract":"陆飞在游戏战队有八个志同道合、歃血为盟的兄弟。
